use_cases: Display notification count with type-based color and icon feedback
Show auto-dismissing alert badges triggered by user clicks
Provide visual status indicators for success, error, warning, or info states
Enhance notification bell icons with actionable count badges
Serve as a lightweight notification system for dashboards and apps
ai_summary: A notification badge component that displays a count on a button with a bell icon, featuring a floating badge overlay that appears with type-specific colors and icons (success, error, info, warning). The badge auto-dismisses after a configurable duration and includes increment/decrement controls for managing notification state. Built with Tailwind CSS and Lucide icons for a clean, minimalist look suitable for various SaaS and application interfaces.
